## Type of Change
<!-- Mark with [x] in the options that apply: -->
- [ ] Bug Fix (Non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New Feature (Non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking Change (Fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation (Changes or additions to documentation)
- [ ] Maintenance / Refactoring (Code improvement without changing main functionality)

## Self-Review Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added unit tests (if applicable) and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have documented changes in configuration files or `changelog.md` if necessary.
